title: York High Hockey Teams Excel at Eden Cup 2025
description: GEORGE NEWS - Schools from across the Eden...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Schools from across the Eden District participated in the inaugural Eden Hockey Cup last weekend 22 to 23 February.


> This event also served as trials for the upcoming Interprovincial Tournaments taking place during the June/July holidays.


York High proudly entered six teams: u14A (boys and girls), u16A (boys and girls), and 1st Boys & Girls, into the two-day tournament. All six teams reached the finals, with four teams emerging victorious in their respective age groups."We are incredibly proud of our players for their sportsmanship, dedication, and resilience throughout the competition," says Jason Slater, director of sport at York High.

"A huge thank you to our staff, parents, and learners for their invaluable support in making this weekend a success.""Our quarry hockey facility provided the perfect setting, and we look forward to building on this achievement in the future."

u.16 teams

u.14 teams

Players absent when the team photos were taken:u14A Boys: Hugo Berning, Liam Patonu14A Girls: Destiney Shabalala, Phindu Marubini, Kylah Kaplan, Nikalah Hermanusu16A Boys: Rome Quirk, Keegan Hornby, Gabriel Witthuhnu16A Girls: Hadassah September1st Boys: Layton Dafel, Stefan Schoeman1st Girls: Naquita Claasen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
